title: Supported Medical Necessity Appeal
payer_reason: Claim denied for medical necessity criteria not met.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: service context supports necessity with exam, imaging, assessment, plan, and treatment rationale.
documentation_summary: Documentation is consistent and available in the packet.
imaging_summary: Synthetic imaging summary supports the documented service rationale.
medical_necessity_rationale: Synthetic rationale links symptoms, findings, and requested service.

title: Recoverable Documentation Attachment Gap
payer_reason: Denied for missing documentation in submitted packet.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: therapy service appears supported by assessment and plan.
documentation_summary: Required signed therapy note was omitted but can provide and attach with resubmission.
missing_required_evidence: Signed therapy note omitted from initial packet.

title: Conflicting Payer Rationale
payer_reason: Denial references both missing documentation and a conflicting non-covered service rationale.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: available notes are inconsistent about the service purpose.
documentation_summary: Documentation has conflicting statements and the denial basis is unclear.
conflicting_documentation: Submitted packet describes covered diagnostic purpose while denial cites excluded screening purpose.

title: Low Evidence Write Off Candidate
payer_reason: Denied for no evidence and not documented service support.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: service context is sparse with no clinical rationale.
documentation_summary: Low evidence packet with absent documentation and no available supporting artifact.
missing_required_evidence: Required clinical rationale and order are absent.

title: Modifier Omission Resubmission
payer_reason: Denied because modifier for distinct same-day service was omitted.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: separate service rationale is supported in the note.
documentation_summary: Modifier documentation was missing from the claim but available for corrected resubmission.
coding_specificity_flags: Modifier omitted from claim despite separate service statement.

title: Coding Mismatch Appeal
payer_reason: Denied for diagnosis code mismatch against submitted CPT service.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: assessment and plan consistently support the coded diagnosis and service.
documentation_summary: Coding rationale is consistent and available.
coding_specificity_flags: Diagnosis and service code linkage is documented.

title: Unsupported Non-Covered Service
payer_reason: Denied as non-covered and excluded service.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: service is listed as excluded by plan rule in the denial text.
documentation_summary: No documentation can change the non-covered exclusion.

title: Borderline Appealability
payer_reason: Denied for medical necessity with borderline criteria language.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: partial criteria support is present but appealability is borderline.
documentation_summary: Documentation is borderline and needs reviewer judgment.
medical_necessity_rationale: Some criteria elements are supported, but one required severity element is unclear.

title: Specialist Review Ambiguity
payer_reason: Denied for unclear medical necessity on a specialist-level service.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: technical criteria and clinical rationale are ambiguous.
documentation_summary: Specialist review candidate due to ambiguous necessity support.
specialist_notes: Specialist note partially supports service but conflicts with utilization review interpretation.

title: Appealability Ambiguity
payer_reason: Denied with unclear appeal rights and ambiguous rationale.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: service may be supported but rationale is not clear.
documentation_summary: Ambiguous denial language requires escalation.
utilization_review_notes: Reviewer text cites two possible denial bases without choosing one.

title: Documentation Insufficiency Resubmission
payer_reason: Denied for insufficient documentation.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: clinical context indicates the service may be supported.
documentation_summary: Missing required order can provide and attach for resubmit.
missing_required_evidence: Required order was not in initial submission.

title: Boundary Sensitive Low Evidence
payer_reason: Denied for criteria not met and no evidence in packet.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: no exam or assessment support is present.
documentation_summary: Low evidence, not documented, but not ambiguous.
missing_required_evidence: Exam, order, and rationale are absent.

title: Partially Supported Imaging Findings
payer_reason: Denied because imaging findings did not meet full medical necessity criteria.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: symptoms and exam provide partial support for advanced imaging.
documentation_summary: Imaging report supports one criterion but does not document duration threshold.
imaging_summary: Imaging finding is present but severity is described as mild.
timeline_flags: Duration threshold is unclear in the synthetic packet.

title: Conflicting Specialist Documentation
payer_reason: Denied for unclear specialist-level necessity.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: primary note supports service while specialist note questions necessity.
documentation_summary: Conflicting specialist documentation requires reviewer escalation.
specialist_notes: Specialist note says service may be premature while plan note says it is needed.

title: Weak Nonzero Necessity Evidence
payer_reason: Denied for weak evidence of necessity.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: one exam element and a brief rationale provide weak but non-zero support.
documentation_summary: Documentation is thin but not empty.
medical_necessity_rationale: Weak but non-zero rationale is present.
operational_theme: weak but non-zero medical necessity evidence

title: Conservative Treatment Ambiguity
payer_reason: Denied because conservative treatment history was not established.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: treatment trial is mentioned but duration and response are unclear.
documentation_summary: Conservative treatment documentation is borderline.
conservative_treatment_history: Physical therapy trial mentioned without clear duration.

title: Timeline Inconsistency
payer_reason: Denied because authorization timing does not match service timing.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: service appears medically supported but authorization sequence is unclear.
documentation_summary: Timeline inconsistency prevents confident resubmission or appeal.
prior_authorization_context: Authorization reference exists but may apply after service.
timeline_flags: Authorization appears after service in the synthetic packet.

title: Utilization Review Disagreement
payer_reason: Denied after utilization review disagreement.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: treating documentation supports service but utilization review disagrees.
documentation_summary: UR disagreement creates conflicting evidence interpretation.
utilization_review_notes: Utilization review states criteria not met despite documented clinical rationale.
conflicting_documentation: Clinical rationale and UR determination conflict.

title: Borderline Modifier Justification
payer_reason: Denied because modifier justification is borderline.
clinical_summary: Synthetic same-day service may be distinct but rationale is incomplete.
documentation_summary: Site and time separation are partially documented.
coding_specificity_flags: Modifier support is partial and borderline.

title: Prior Authorization Mismatch Ambiguity
payer_reason: Denied for prior authorization mismatch.
clinical_summary: Synthetic service was authorized for a related but not identical service category.
documentation_summary: Authorization mismatch may be correctable but requires plan review.
prior_authorization_context: Authorization code family differs from submitted service code.
coding_specificity_flags: Submitted service specificity may not match authorization specificity.

title: Conflicting Coding Specificity
payer_reason: Denied because coded specificity conflicts with submitted documentation.
clinical_summary: Synthetic diagnosis support exists but laterality and severity are inconsistent.
documentation_summary: Coding specificity conflict is visible in the packet.
coding_specificity_flags: Laterality and severity specificity conflict across documents.
conflicting_documentation: One note supports left-sided specificity and another supports right-sided specificity.

title: Incomplete Longitudinal Evidence
payer_reason: Denied because longitudinal trend evidence was incomplete.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: current note supports service but trend evidence is missing.
documentation_summary: Prior trend note can be attached for resubmission.
lab_summary: Current lab value is present; longitudinal trend is not included.

title: Low Evidence High Risk Denial
payer_reason: Denied for low evidence on specialist-level safety-sensitive service.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: high-risk service context but packet has sparse rationale.
documentation_summary: Low evidence and high-risk context require specialist escalation.
specialist_notes: Specialist review is needed because support is sparse and service is safety-sensitive.

title: Recoverability Tension
payer_reason: Denied for missing evidence, but partial support exists elsewhere.
clinical_summary: Synthetic case: service may be supported if external note is attached.
documentation_summary: Required evidence is missing from packet but referenced as available elsewhere.
treatment_history: Treatment history partially supports the service.
